campTitle: The Other Side: Operation Close the Gate
subtitle: Havenwood Mission Control
backstory: Havenwood is slipping between worlds. Strange signals are reaching the Safe Zone, crews are racing through the dark, and every clue points back to the Gate. Your mission is to decode the mystery, protect your crew, and close the breach before the Other Side spills into camp.
overallGateStatus: Controlled. Static pulses remain, but the Safe Zone is holding.
